MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Neiman Marcus, a division of The Neiman-Marcus Group, Inc.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, and considered declaration of Jerry Schaknowski, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Patricia Ann Richardson aka Patricia A. Richardson as follows:
Damages $153,702.79
Prejudgment Interest $11,636.97
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $490.90, for a total of $168,655.66
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Continued To Sep-18-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., and Kenneth B. Tsang, Esq., specially appearing for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 9/18/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Rita Arlene Howell, CSR#2542 (212)
